---
title: "How to cite GLEAM"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{How to cite GLEAM}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Recommended citation

```{r, eval=FALSE}
citation("GLEAM")
```

Copy-ready format:

Woo J (2026). **GLEAM: Gene-set and cell-state exploration across space and time in R**. R package version 0.2.0. <https://github.com/JamesWu7/GLEAM>

## Citation file

GLEAM provides an `inst/CITATION` file so standard R citation workflows (`citation("GLEAM")`) resolve package citation metadata consistently.

## Methods citation notes

If you use optional backends (e.g., `msigdbr`, `UCell`, `AUCell`, `GSVA`, `singscore`, `monocle`, `monocle3`, `slingshot`, `tradeSeq`), cite those tools in addition to GLEAM.
